text.message: I don't know where to go

think your setup is pretty amazing
not sure what the hesitation was

So why didn't you take 8 5 10, you had first pick
no dude thats not how that works
So you left it even though it's better? You're funny
well no green is getting his setup online

Ok, can we spread the love? That's 4 robs in a row

cant be trading green here anymore guys
red you sorta made a monster with those brick trades
is probably losing for you oj

it's your right to see it like this
